name: Sopa De Frijoles Negros (Easy Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the canned black beans in a blender and blend until completely smooth.
2. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the onion, minced garlic, cilantro, cumin, chili powder, celery, and salt to the saucepan.
4. Cook until the onion is transparent.
5. Stir in the tomato sauce, blended black beans, and chicken broth.
6. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot and top with sour cream.
